summary: BLOCK 349: Image Proxy for CORS-safe canvas export tested successfully. Backend GET /api/image-proxy proxies external images with CORS headers. Frontend proxyImageUrl() correctly wraps Discogs URLs through proxy, passes local/data URIs through unchanged. ReportImg component supports fallbacks prop. ShareCard uses proxied URLs for html2canvas. handleShare() includes pre-flight image loading. Date range displays correctly (BLOCK 333 regression check passed).

minor.issue: Cache-Control header shows 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' instead of 'public, max-age=86400' due to Kubernetes ingress/proxy layer overriding headers. Code sets correct header but deployment environment overrides it.
minor.note: Not a code bug - deployment infrastructure issue

critical_code_review_comments: image_proxy.py line 27-30: CORS header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *' correctly set
image_proxy.py line 33: Uses httpx.AsyncClient with follow_redirects=True for Discogs redirect handling
image_proxy.py line 41-42: LRU cache implementation (max 50 entries) prevents repeated upstream fetches
WeeklyReportPage.js line 13-23: proxyImageUrl() correctly routes external http(s) URLs through /api/image-proxy
WeeklyReportPage.js line 18: Local /api/files/serve/ and data: URIs pass through unchanged
WeeklyReportPage.js line 26-34: preflightImage() pre-loads images with crossOrigin='anonymous' before canvas export
WeeklyReportPage.js line 37-65: ReportImg component accepts 'fallbacks' prop and tries each on error before showing placeholder
WeeklyReportPage.js line 64: All ReportImg images have crossOrigin='anonymous' attribute
WeeklyReportPage.js line 227-244: ShareCardImg uses proxied URLs and supports fallback chain
WeeklyReportPage.js line 394-405: handleShare() calls preflightImage() for hero image before html2canvas

success_rate.backend: 89% (8/9 tests passed - 1 minor cache header infrastructure issue)

seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test user with 0 records (Fresh Start view)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 349 image proxy tested. Proxy endpoint works correctly for Discogs images. The test user has 0 records so Weekly Report shows 'Fresh Start' view. To fully test hero image rendering with actual album art, need a user with records. The 403 errors in console logs are from OTHER pages (Hive feed) that haven't been updated to use the proxy yet - not from Weekly Report page itself.

BLOCK_349_backend_image_proxy.details: GET /api/image-proxy?url={encoded_url} returns proxied image with Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * header

BLOCK_349_proxy_error_handling.details: Invalid/missing URLs return 400/422, non-existent images return 404/502

BLOCK_349_proxyImageUrl_external_urls.details: External http(s) URLs like Discogs are routed through /api/image-proxy?url=...

BLOCK_349_proxyImageUrl_local_passthroug.details: Local /api/files/serve/ URLs and data: URIs pass through unchanged

BLOCK_349_ReportImg_fallbacks.details: ReportImg component accepts 'fallbacks' prop and tries each URL on error

BLOCK_349_weekly_report_loads.details: /reports/weekly loads without errors, shows all slides

BLOCK_349_crossOrigin_anonymous.details: ReportImg images have crossOrigin='anonymous' attribute for canvas compatibility

BLOCK_349_handleShare_preflight.details: handleShare() calls preflightImage() before html2canvas to pre-cache images

BLOCK_333_date_range_regression.details: Date range 'MARCH 4 – MARCH 11, 2026' displays correctly in intro slide

mocked_api_note: Streaming links (Spotify/Apple Music) are MOCKED with search URL placeholders. Resend email is MOCKED for most platform emails.
